name: kilele
description: Kilele Bridge — Kenyan freelancer coaching platform (FastAPI + Next.js static export, single Heroku dyno)

APP_ENV.description: Runtime environment. Set to 'production' on Heroku.

APP_SECRET_KEY.description: 64+ character random secret used to sign JWTs. Generate with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(64))"

INTASEND_SECRET_KEY.description: IntaSend secret key. Keep this private — never expose client-side.

INTASEND_TEST_MODE.description: Set to 'false' for live payments, 'true' for IntaSend sandbox.

PAYMENT_REDIRECT_URL.description: URL IntaSend redirects to after checkout. Must match your Heroku app URL.

PAYMENT_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for verifying IntaSend webhook signatures. Generate with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

FRONTEND_URL.description: Canonical public URL of the app. Used for CORS allow-list in production.

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: Number of gunicorn workers. 1 is correct for a free/eco single dyno.
